content: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti said on Saturday he has no plans to replace Neymar in his World Cup squad and brushed off questions about whether he would have selected the forward had he know the extent of his calf injury.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂：选择受伤的内马尔无悔
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂表示，尽管前锋内马尔小腿受伤，他没有计划更换世界杯阵容中的内马尔。安切洛蒂说，即使事先知道内马尔的伤势程度，他也不会改变选择决定。

title: What's happened in soccer since the 2022 World Cup...
summary: For viewers returning to the World Cup after missing coverage since Qatar 2022, significant changes have occurred in soccer. The article provides context on major developments in the sport over the past four years.
content: If you're readying to tune back into the World Cup but haven't watched much since Qatar 2022, what have you missed? Quite a lot, actually.

zh.title: 自2022年世界杯以来足球界发生了什么
zh.summary: 对于自卡塔尔2022年以来错过世界杯报道的观众来说，足球界已发生了重大变化。该文章提供了过去四年来该运动的主要发展背景。

title: How the World Cup's 'least-known' player became a ...
summary: New Zealand's Tim Payne was the World Cup's least-known player until a social media personality brought attention to him. The story highlights how social media can elevate previously obscure athletes to prominence.
content: The World Cup's least-known player was New Zealand's Tim Payne, until a social media personality changed that.

zh.title: 世界杯"最不为人知"的球员是如何成名的
zh.summary: 新西兰球员蒂姆·佩恩是世界杯上最不为人知的球员，直到一位社交媒体名人为他吸引了关注。这个故事强调了社交媒体如何能将以前籍籍无名的运动员推向名人地位。

title: How PSG bested Arsenal to win UEFA Champions Leagu...
summary: Paris Saint-Germain won the UEFA Champions League title for the second consecutive year by defeating Arsenal. PSG's back-to-back victories represent a dominant run in European competition.
content: Paris Saint-Germain are your UEFA Champions League winners for the second year in a row.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼如何击败阿森纳赢得欧洲冠军联赛
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼通过击败阿森纳连续第二年赢得欧洲冠军联赛冠军。PSG的背靠背胜利代表了欧洲竞争中的统治地位。

title: VAR review: UCL ref got the Mendes-Madueke call ri...
summary: A VAR review of Saturday's Champions League final examines controversial decisions, including official review of Nuno Mendes' challenge on Noni Madueke. Analyst Andy Davies breaks down the controversial calls from the match.
content: There were a number of controversial decisions made in Saturday's UCL final. Andy Davies breaks down each of the calls, including Nuno Mendes' challenge on Noni Madueke.

zh.title: VAR审查:欧冠裁判对门德斯-马杜埃克犯规判罚正确
zh.summary: 这是对周六欧冠决赛的VAR审查,审视争议判罚,包括对努诺·门德斯对诺尼·马杜埃克防守的正式审查。分析师安迪·戴维斯详细分析了比赛中的争议判罚。
